title: Saudi Arabian Barley Pilaf
description: A traditional Saudi Arabian dish made with barley and spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the pilaf and cook until lightly toasted, about 2 minutes.
Add the barley and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the sweet and crisp, stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the barley is tender.
Stir in the Arabian spices and cook for 1 minute.
